title: Final Adjustments
subtitle: Getting ready for birth
description: By week 35, your baby is making final adjustments for birth. Most organs are fully developed, and your baby continues to gain weight and settle into position.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements remain strong but feel tighter due to limited space
Most organ systems are fully developed
You may feel increased pelvic pressure and discomfort
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine

medical_checkups.note: Frequent monitoring is important as you approach delivery.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal position

commonly_suggested.name: Group B Streptococcus (GBS) Test
commonly_suggested.purpose: Screens for bacterial infection before delivery

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may perform GBS screening during this stage as part of routine care.

important_note: Screening tests at this stage help prepare for a safe delivery.
reassurance: Your baby is almost ready to enter the world.
medical_disclaimer: Follow your healthcare provider’s advice for all tests and preparations.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports final growth and preparation for delivery.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely monitored during this stage.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy final phase.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports oxygen supply during this final stage.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential as delivery approaches.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may become more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support metabolic stability during the final stage.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you prepare for delivery, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and mindful care.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a safe and healthy delivery.
